title: Fan
description: Fan: Fans are devices that create a current of air (used for ventilation and cooling) by rotating blades

FlowRate.description: Flow Rate denotes the amount of air that is drawn across the fan, measured in m3/s

ExternalStaticPressure.description: External static pressure denotes the resistance within the system that the fan has to overcome from filters, grilles, coils, etc

Speed.description: Speed denotes the rotational speed of the fan blades

DriveType.description: Drive type denotes the drive type as either direct or belt

SpeedControl.description: A device for controlling the fan speed.

Efficiency.description: Efficiency denotes the ratio between the power transferred to airflow produced by the fan and the power used by the fan

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
